reviews.comment:
Tiene varios servicios útiles y bien brindados, pero falta mejorar un poco el estado de los baños!! Aunque, en cuanto a limpieza, bastante bien!

(Translated by Google)
It has several useful and well-provided services, but the condition of the bathrooms needs some improvement! However, in terms of cleanliness, it's quite good!
